```
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Privacy Policy - Elimu Pepe</title>
    <style>
      :root {
        --primary-color: #2c3e50;
        --accent-color: #3498db;
        --bg-color: #f4f7f6;
        --text-color: #333;
      }
      body {
        font-family:
          "Inter",
          -apple-system,
          BlinkMacSystemFont,
          "Segoe UI",
          Roboto,
          Helvetica,
          Arial,
          sans-serif;
        line-height: 1.7;
        color: var(--text-color);
        background-color: var(--bg-color);
        margin: 0;
        padding: 20px;
      }
      .policy-container {
        max-width: 900px;
        margin: 40px auto;
        background: #fff;
        padding: 50px;
        border-radius: 12px;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
      }
      h1 {
        color: var(--primary-color);
        font-size: 2.5rem;
        border-bottom: 3px solid var(--accent-color);
        padding-bottom: 15px;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
      }
      .subtitle {
        font-size: 1.2rem;
        color: #7f8c8d;
        margin-bottom: 40px;
      }
      h2 {
        color: var(--primary-color);
        margin-top: 40px;
        font-size: 1.6rem;
        border-left: 5px solid var(--accent-color);
        padding-left: 15px;
      }
      h3 {
        color: #2c3e50;
        margin-top: 25px;
      }
      h4 {
        color: #34495e;
        text-decoration: underline;
      }
      p,
      li {
        font-size: 1.05rem;
        margin-bottom: 15px;
      }
      ul {
        padding-left: 20px;
      }
      .highlight-box {
        background-color: #e8f4fd;
        padding: 20px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        border: 1px solid #d1e9f9;
        margin: 20px 0;
      }
      .footer-note {
        text-align: center;
        margin-top: 50px;
        font-size: 0.9rem;
        color: #95a5a6;
      }
      @media (max-width: 600px) {
        .policy-container {
          padding: 20px;
          margin: 10px;
        }
        h1 {
          font-size: 1.8rem;
        }
      }
    </style>
  </head>
  <body>
    <nav style="text-align: center; background: #f0f0f0; padding: 10px">
      <a
        href="index.html"
        style="margin: 0 15px; text-decoration: none; color: #2c3e50"
        >Privacy Policy</a
      >
      <a
        href="term.html"
        style="margin: 0 15px; text-decoration: none; color: #2c3e50"
        >Terms & Conditions</a
      >
    </nav>
    <div class="policy-container">
      <img
        src="logo.png"
        alt="Elimu Pepe Logo"
        style="
          max-width: 150px;
          height: auto;
          display: block;
          margin: 0 auto 20px;
        "
      />
      <h1>Privacy Policy</h1>
      <p class="subtitle">Your Privacy is Our Priority</p>
      <p><strong>Last Updated: October 2026</strong></p>

      <section>
        <div class="container">
          <h2>1. Introduction</h2>
          <p>
            Welcome to <strong>Elimu Pepe</strong>. We are committed to
            protecting your privacy in compliance with the Kenya Data Protection
            Act, 2019 and international best practices such as GDPR.
          </p>

          <h2>2. Information We Collect</h2>

          <h3>a) Personal Information</h3>
          <ul>
            <li>Name</li>
            <li>Email address</li>
            <li>Account login details</li>
            <li>Support messages</li>
          </ul>

          <h3>b) Usage Data</h3>
          <ul>
            <li>Reading activity and preferences</li>
            <li>Features used</li>
            <li>Session duration</li>
          </ul>

          <h3>c) Device Information</h3>
          <ul>
            <li>Device type and model</li>
            <li>Operating system</li>
            <li>IP address</li>
            <li>App version</li>
          </ul>

          <h2>3. Legal Basis for Processing</h2>
          <ul>
            <li>Consent</li>
            <li>Contractual necessity</li>
            <li>Legitimate interests</li>
            <li>Legal obligations</li>
          </ul>

          <h2>4. How We Use Your Information</h2>
          <ul>
            <li>Provide and maintain the app</li>
            <li>Improve user experience</li>
            <li>Send updates and notifications</li>
            <li>Provide customer support</li>
            <li>Ensure security</li>
          </ul>

          <h2>5. Data Sharing</h2>
          <p>
            We do not sell your personal data. We only share data with trusted
            providers or when required by law.
          </p>

          <h2>6. Data Security</h2>
          <p>
            We implement appropriate security measures to protect
... (truncated)
```

```
        border-radius: 12px;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
      }
      .page-logo {
        max-width: 150px;
        height: auto;
        display: block;
        margin: 0 auto 20px;
      }
      h1 {
        color: var(--primary-color);
        font-size: 2.5rem;
        border-bottom: 3px solid var(--accent-color);
        padding-bottom: 15px;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
      }
      .subtitle {
        font-size: 1.2rem;
        color: #7f8c8d;
        margin-bottom: 40px;
      }
      h2 {
        color: var(--primary-color);
        margin-top: 40px;
        font-size: 1.6rem;
        border-left: 5px solid var(--accent-color);
        padding-left: 15px;
      }
      h3 {
        color: #2c3e50;
        margin-top: 25px;
      }
      h4 {
        color: #34495e;
        text-decoration: underline;
      }
      p,
      li {
        font-size: 1.05rem;
        margin-bottom: 15px;
      }
      ul {
        padding-left: 20px;
      }
      a {
        color: var(--accent-color);
      }
      .highlight-box {
        background-color: #e8f4fd;
        padding: 20px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        border: 1px solid #d1e9f9;
        margin: 20px 0;
      }
      .footer-note {
        text-align: center;
        margin-top: 50px;
        font-size: 0.9rem;
        color: #95a5a6;
      }
      @media (max-width: 600px) {
        .policy-container {
          padding: 20px;
          margin: 10px;
        }
        h1 {
          font-size: 1.8rem;
        }
      }
    </style>
  </head>
  <body>
    <nav>
      <a href="index.html">Privacy Policy</a>
      <a href="term.html">Terms & Conditions</a>
    </nav>
    <div class="policy-container">
      <img src="logo.png" alt="Elimu Pepe Logo" class="page-logo" />
      <p class="subtitle">Your Privacy is Our Priority</p>
      <div>
        <strong
          ><span style="font-size: 26px"
            ><span data-custom-class="title"
              ><bdt class="block-component"></bdt
              ><bdt class="question"><h1>PRIVACY POLICY</h1></bdt
              ><bdt class="statement-end-if-in-editor"></bdt></span></span
        ></strong>
      </div>
      <div>
        <span style="color: rgb(127, 127, 127)"
          ><strong
            ><span style="font-size: 15px"
              ><span data-custom-class="subtitle"
                >Last updated <bdt class="question">April 08, 2026</bdt></span
              ></span
            ></strong
          ></span
        >
      </div>
      <div><br /></div>
      <div><br /></div>
      <div><br /></div>
      <div style="line-height: 1.5">
        <span style="color: rgb(127, 127, 127)"
          ><span style="color: rgb(89, 89, 89); font-size: 15px"
            ><span data-custom-class="body_text"
```
</details></tool-use>

_**User (2026-04-08 07:09:16Z)**_

add this 2. FAMILIES POLICY REQUIREMENTS: FAMILIES DEVICE IDENTIFIERS

For family accounts, we collect device identifiers to:

Manage family subscriptions and linked devices
Enhance account security and detect unauthorized access
Provide parental controls for children’s learning content
Support analytics and feature improvements (without identifying children personally)

Device identifiers include:

Mobile Device ID / UDID
Device model and manufacturer
Operating system and version
App-specific identifiers

Key Points:

Device identifiers are not used for advertising to children
Parents/guardians can review, update, or delete linked devices
Device identifiers are considered personal information and are processed in line with this Privacy Notice

Managing Family Devices:

Use your account dashboard to review, add, or remove devices
Contact support@loholearning.co.ke
 for assistance


---
